specialRules.CX-16: Special-color version of the BahamutBlitz BK1-50I functional configuration; four customizable blade components.
specialRules.UX-19: BulletGriffon has an integrated ratchet and cannot receive a separate ratchet.
specialRules.9-60: Two physical copies are owned, but official 3-on-3 duplicate-part rules permit only one in a deck.
